'''gopasaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:hiatic|hiatic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-p-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hiatic|hiatic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| gopasaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gopasithi|gopasithi]] || [[word:gopasiji|gopasiji]] || [[word:gopasishi|gopasishi]] || [[word:gopasiki|gopasiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gopasuthuthu|gopasuthuthu]] || [[word:gopasujuju|gopasujuju]] || [[word:gopasushushu|gopasushushu]] || [[word:gopasukuku|gopasukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gopasuthu|gopasuthu]] || [[word:gopasuju|gopasuju]] || [[word:gopasushu|gopasushu]] || [[word:gopasuku|gopasuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gopasufthuf|gopasufthuf]] || [[word:gopasufjuf|gopasufjuf]] || [[word:gopasufshuf|gopasufshuf]] || [[word:gopasufkuf|gopasufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gopasethe|gopasethe]] || [[word:gopaseje|gopaseje]] || [[word:gopaseshe|gopaseshe]] || [[word:gopaseke|gopaseke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gopasothotho|gopasothotho]] || [[word:gopasojojo|gopasojojo]] || [[word:gopasoshosho|gopasoshosho]] || [[word:gopasokoko|gopasokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gopasotho|gopasotho]] || [[word:gopasojo|gopasojo]] || [[word:gopasosho|gopasosho]] || [[word:gopasoko|gopasoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gopasofthof|gopasofthof]] || [[word:gopasofjof|gopasofjof]] || [[word:gopasofshof|gopasofshof]] || [[word:gopasofkof|gopasofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:gopasÃŸfthÃŸf|gopasÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:gopasÃŸfjÃŸf|gopasÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:gopasÃŸfshÃŸf|gopasÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:gopasÃŸfkÃŸf|gopasÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:gopasÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|gopasÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:gopasÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|gopasÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:gopasÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|gopasÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:gopasÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|gopasÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:gopasÃŸfthÃŸf|gopasÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:gopasÃŸfjÃŸf|gopasÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:gopasÃŸfshÃŸf|gopasÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:gopasÃŸfkÃŸf|gopasÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:gopasÃŸfthÃŸf|gopasÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:gopasÃŸfjÃŸf|gopasÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:gopasÃŸfshÃŸf|gopasÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:gopasÃŸfkÃŸf|gopasÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gopasÃḊthÃḊ|gopasÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:gopasÃḊjÃḊ|gopasÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:gopasÃḊshÃḊ|gopasÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:gopasÃḊkÃḊ|gopasÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gopasathatha|gopasathatha]] || [[word:gopasajaja|gopasajaja]] || [[word:gopasashasha|gopasashasha]] || [[word:gopasakaka|gopasakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gopasatha|gopasatha]] || [[word:gopasaja|gopasaja]] || [[word:gopasasha|gopasasha]] || [[word:gopasaka|gopasaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gopasafthaf|gopasafthaf]] || [[word:gopasafjaf|gopasafjaf]] || [[word:gopasafshaf|gopasafshaf]] || [[word:gopasafkaf|gopasafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:gopasasha|gopasasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:gopashÃḋsha|gopashÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopasrosha|gopasrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gopasmusha|gopasmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:gopasyasha|gopasyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogopasnkshÃḋsha|gogopasnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogopasnkrosha|gogopasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogopasnkmusha|gogopasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogopasnkyasha|gogopasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:gopapasasha|gopapasasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gopapashÃḋsha|gopapashÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopapasrosha|gopapasrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gopapasmusha|gopapasmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gopapasyasha|gopapasyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogopapasnkshÃḋsha|gogopapasnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogopapasnkrosha|gogopapasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogopapasnkmusha|gogopapasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogopapasnkyasha|gogopapasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:gepÃḊsasha|gepÃḊsasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gepÃḊshÃḋsha|gepÃḊshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gepÃḊsrosha|gepÃḊsrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gepÃḊsmusha|gepÃḊsmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gepÃḊsyasha|gepÃḊsyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogepÃḊsnkshÃḋsha|gogepÃḊsnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogepÃḊsnkrosha|gogepÃḊsnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogepÃḊsnkmusha|gogepÃḊsnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogepÃḊsnkyasha|gogepÃḊsnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:gopfasasha|gopfasasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gopfashÃḋsha|gopfashÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopfasrosha|gopfasrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gopfasmusha|gopfasmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gopfasyasha|gopfasyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogopfasnkshÃḋsha|gogopfasnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogopfasnkrosha|gogopfasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogopfasnkmusha|gogopfasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogopfasnkyasha|gogopfasnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
